ab: Takna, munhaan aak asang tantungu haan Aki.
ch: 昨天，我去部落拜訪爺爺。
en: Yesterday, I went to visit my grandpa in the tribe.

ab: Talmadiin aam nii tu mapasadu, minliliskin aak istaa.
ch: 我們很久沒有見面了，我很想念他。
en: We haven’t seen each other for a long time and I miss him a lot.

ab: Sadu a Aki zaku, pakaun zaku ki sikua, paquu zaku ucia.
ch: 爺爺一看到我，就請我吃西瓜，請我喝茶。
en: As soon as grandpa saw me, he invited me to eat watermelon and drink tea.

ab: Sinsuaz Aki tu sikua madavusdaingaz, tutuza tu masihal saa kaunun.
ch: 爺爺種的西瓜很甜，真的很好吃。
en: The watermelon grown by grandpa is very sweet and really delicious.

ab: Mazima aak amin Aki tu ucia, masihal amin quudan.
ch: 我也喜歡爺爺的茶，也很好喝。
en: I also like grandpa’s tea, it’s tasted good too.

ab: Isaan tinaungqu, dusa aak Bai mapit’ia paitutaungqu.
ch: 中午的時候，我和奶奶一起煮午餐。
en: At noon, I cooked lunch with my grandma.

ab: Mapit’ia ka Bai madia tu paitutaungqu, haiza iskaan, haiza maitulkuk, haiza bahat, haiza ang siqut.
ch: 奶奶煮了很豐盛的午餐，有魚、有雞、有南瓜、還有蝸牛。
en: Grandma cooked a big lunch, including fish, chicken, pumpkin, and snails.

ab: Minaun in paitutaungqu, munhaan aam patsanglavan mati’ngus sanglav.
ch: 吃完午餐後，我們去菜園摘菜。
en: After lunch, we went to the vegetable garden to pick vegetables.

ab: Siza Bai madia tu hutan, tai siin salu-pinasaq masaiv zaku, nadasun dau zaku pulumaq.
ch: 奶奶拿了很多地瓜、芋頭和蕗蕎給我，要我帶回家。
en: Grandma brought me a lot of sweet potatoes, taro and buckwheat, and asked me to take them home.

ab: Tukakivuk aingka, tupauk tu namuqna mapasaduu intaa.
ch: 我跟他們道別，說下次再去看他們。
en: I said goodbye to them and said I’d see them next time.
